description: A crisp Chardonnay-based sparkler with fine bubbles and a bright robe. Features refreshing notes of green apple, citrus, and a subtle brioche finish with balanced acidity and a dry, clean palate.

wine: Stødig Rosésider Eple&Bringebær fra Lien gård
description: A unique hybrid cider-style sparkling. Expect a light body with high, zesty acidity and vibrant notes of fresh orchard apples and tart raspberries, finished with a bone-dry mineral snap.
Classic Pfalz Riesling characterized by a very dry (Trocken) profile and a lean body. Dominated by piercing acidity with flavors of lime zest, wet stone, and green apple.
A medium-bodied, aromatic blend rich in Viognier. Offers an oily texture and notes of apricot, white peach, and honeysuckle, balanced by a fresh, mineral-driven finish.
A sophisticated Galician white with a creamy mouthfeel. Showcases bright acidity alongside flavors of yellow stone fruit, saline minerals, and a touch of wild herbs.
A southern-inflected Chardonnay with Burgundian precision. Features a medium body, crisp acidity, and a profile of lemon curd, pear, and subtle flinty minerality.
A crystalline and lean white with high, vibrating acidity. Features sharp citrus notes of lemon and unripe pear with a light body and a distinctive mineral, slightly bitter finish.
An elegant, biodynamic Monthélie white. Medium-bodied with a soft texture, offering notes of golden apple, white flowers, and a lingering chalky finish with moderate acidity.
Vibrant and high-toned with the characteristic Barbera acidity. Features a light-to-medium body, minimal tannins, and intense flavors of sour cherry and wild berries.
A juicy, fruit-forward red dominated by Grenache. Medium-to-full-bodied with soft tannins, showcasing ripe strawberry, black pepper, and garrigue spices.
An 'entry-level Barolo' in style. High acidity and firm tannins frame a complex profile of dried rose petals, cherry, tar, and savory tobacco notes.
Classic cool-climate Pinot Noir with a light body and bright red-fruit focus. Features tart cherry and cranberry notes with earthy undertones and fine-grained tannins.
A luscious dessert wine with a perfect balance of high sweetness and electric acidity. Expect rich flavors of honey, baked apricot, and slate minerality.
English sparkling wine with a rich, bready character. High acidity typical of the region is balanced by notes of baked apple, citrus, and a creamy mousse.
A sophisticated 'Partridge Eye' Rosé Champagne. Offers a delicate salmon hue, subtle red berry flavors, and a refined, yeasty finish with crisp acidity.

wine: L'Atavique Verzy Grand Cru Extra Brut
description: A powerful, terroir-driven Grand Cru Champagne. Bone-dry with high tension, featuring intense chalky minerality, citrus zest, and toasted brioche.
A Pinot Noir-dominant blend providing structure and body. Notes of red apple, honey, and spice with a long, elegant finish and balanced acidity.
A benchmark for precision and purity. High acidity with a linear, laser-like focus on lemon, green apple, and white floral notes over a chalky mineral base.

wine: Blanc de Blancs Cuvée Réservée MAG
description: The Magnum edition of this prestige cuvée. The larger format allows for even more refined bubbles and a preserved freshness, highlighting lemon peel and intense chalky finish.
A lean, precise Champagne with a focus on purity. Minimal dosage highlights a light body, sharp acidity, and flavors of lemon, white peach, and wet stones.
A single-vineyard Pinot Noir Champagne. Bold and structured with a rounder mouthfeel, featuring notes of red currants, raspberries, and a spicy, savory finish.
A rare 100% Pinot Blanc Champagne. Offers a rounder, softer texture than Chardonnay, with notes of orchard fruit, white blossoms, and a gentle creamy finish.
A unique blend featuring Pinot Blanc. Fresh and approachable with medium acidity and flavors of pear, apple, and white flowers over a subtle mineral spine.
A Blanc de Noirs of great character. Full-bodied for a sparkler, with structural red berry fruit, earthy depth, and a long, savory finish.
A delicate and fresh Rosé with moderate acidity. Features bright strawberry and pomegranate flavors with a clean, light-bodied finish.
An extremely dry, zero-dosage Champagne. High acidity and intense energy, with notes of dried citrus, ginger, and profound mineral depth.
Classic Burgundian bubbles with a fresh, fruity character. Light-bodied with moderate acidity and notes of white peach and lemon peel.
A 'Pet-Nat' with raw, wild energy. Unfiltered and cloudy, offering yeasty notes, crisp cider-like acidity, and fresh orchard fruit flavors.
High-end German Sekt with serious structure. Bone-dry with electric acidity, featuring notes of lime, green apple, and a persistent stony finish.
A benchmark Trentodoc. Elegant and fresh with balanced acidity and a light-to-medium body. Flavors of golden apple and wildflower honey with a bready finish.
A step up in complexity. Longer aging provides a creamier texture and deeper notes of almond, toasted bread, and ripe yellow fruit.
A classic Bordeaux Blanc blend of Sauvignon Blanc and Semillon. Medium-bodied with zesty citrus and grass notes balanced by the waxy texture of Semillon.
Pure, unadulterated Chablis. High acidity and a light body with intense notes of green apple, lemon, and the region's signature oyster-shell minerality.
More concentrated than the village level. Features ripe citrus and white flowers with a persistent, salty mineral finish and sharp acidic structure.
Power and elegance combined. A full-bodied white with layers of lemon curd, stone fruits, and profound depth of wet-stone minerality.
A Chablis-adjacent white with high tension. Lean and precise, featuring flavors of green fruit, citrus, and a clean, chalky mineral snap.
A fresh and approachable Aligoté. Light-bodied with high acidity and notes of lemon, white flowers, and a touch of fresh herbs.
High-energy white with a lean profile. Electric acidity highlights flavors of lime, green apple, and a lingering flinty finish.
A modern, small-production Aligoté. Features a light body, sharp acidity, and a profile focused on citrus zest and stony minerality.
Coming from a top producer, this is a refined Aligoté. Exceptional balance of high acidity and a slightly more textured body with notes of orchard fruit.
A benchmark for the varietal. Laser-focused acidity, reduction (gunflint notes), and intense citrus drive with a saline, mineral finish.

wine: Bourgogne Aligoté Le Bas de Chailloux
description: A terroir-specific Aligoté. Light-bodied and crisp, with high acidity and a profile of lemon, white peach, and wet stone.
A 'Meursault-adjacent' Bourgogne Blanc. Medium-bodied with a touch of oak influence, offering notes of butter, lemon, and golden apple.
Magnum format of the Femelottes. Expect a slower aging profile, preserving the fresh citrus and apple notes alongside a creamy, medium-bodied texture.
A serious, medium-bodied Chardonnay. Features a round structure with notes of apple, lemon curd, hazelnut, and a subtle touch of oak.

wine: Côteaux de l'Auxois Clos de la Romanéé
description: A unique white from outside the main Côte d'Or. Light-to-medium bodied with high acidity and refreshing notes of orchard fruit and white flowers.
An elegant, well-structured Chardonnay. Balanced acidity meets a medium body with notes of white peach, citrus, and a clean mineral finish.
Rich and aromatic Burgundy. Features a medium-to-bold body with notes of butter, lemon, oak, and a touch of tropical pineapple.
A mineral-driven, expressive white. Features ripe peach fruit and oatmeal notes with a crisp, long finish and very subtle oak.
Highly coveted white with legendary precision. Medium-bodied and dry with high acidity and a complex profile of citrus, stone fruit, and flinty minerality.
Classic Puligny-style Chardonnay. Medium-bodied with high acidity, showcasing elegant notes of lemon, white flowers, and a persistent mineral finish.

wine: Côtes de Beaune Jardin de Calvaire
description: A more site-specific white with increased concentration. Features layers of citrus, orchard fruit, and a refined, elegant structure.
A high-tension white from the northern reaches. Light-bodied with piercing acidity and intense notes of green apple and wet stones.
Vinified in stainless steel (Inox) to preserve purity. Offers an extremely clean, light-bodied profile with high acidity and crisp lemon/apple flavors.
Signature PYCM style. Intense reduction (flint/matchstick), high acidity, and a concentrated palate of citrus and green apple with a long mineral finish.
From higher altitude vines. Features even higher acidity and a leaner body with bright citrus and floral notes and a very fresh finish.

wine: Hautes Côtes de Beaune Vieilles Vignes
description: Old vine concentration. A medium-bodied white with balanced acidity and a complex profile of stone fruit, citrus, and subtle earthy minerals.

wine: Bourgogne Blanc Le Clos du Chateau
description: From a walled vineyard. Offers a medium body with elegant notes of white peach, citrus, and a refined, mineral-driven finish with balanced acidity.
Produced by a master of Volnay. This white is elegant and understated, with a medium body, fine acidity, and pure orchard fruit flavors.
A high-quality Chardonnay from Meursault's legend. Medium-bodied and rich, with notes of butter, citrus, and a well-integrated touch of oak.
A stylish and precise Chardonnay. Medium-bodied with crisp acidity and notes of white peach, lemon, and a distinctive chalky minerality.
From a high-altitude site. Lean, fresh, and high in acidity, with intense notes of green apple, citrus, and wet stone.
A rare white from the northern Côte de Nuits. Medium-bodied with balanced acidity and flavors of white flowers, pear, and a touch of almond.
A high-tension, fresh white. Medium-bodied with bright acidity and a profile of lemon zest, green apple, and flinty minerality.
A biodynamic white with a soft, inviting texture. Medium-bodied with notes of golden apple, honey, and a clean mineral finish.
Exceptional precision and depth. Medium-bodied with high acidity and a complex profile of citrus, stone fruit, and profound stony minerality.
A high-quality white from the Leflaive family. Elegant and fresh with balanced acidity and notes of white peach, citrus, and white flowers.
The benchmark for Puligny. Elegant, medium-bodied, and dry with high acidity. Features notes of lemon curd, white peach, and legendary mineral depth.
The 2023 vintage of this premier cru. Expect vibrant energy, high acidity, and a slightly more floral, expressive fruit profile compared to the 2022.
From a rocky, high-altitude site. Features a leaner, more mineral profile than typical Meursault, with high acidity and sharp citrus notes.

wine: Meursault Clos des Corvees de Citeau
description: A monopole vineyard. Offers a classic Meursault richness with a medium-to-bold body, notes of butter, toasted nuts, and ripe yellow fruit.
Classic Meursault profile with notes of oak and butter. Medium-to-bold body with balanced acidity and a long, nutty finish.
A wine of incredible purity and focus. Medium-bodied with high acidity and a profile of lemon, white flowers, and intense flinty minerality.
The 2023 vintage. Expect the same legendary precision with perhaps a slightly more generous fruit profile and the same crystalline acidity.
Known for its elegance and high-toned fruit. Medium-bodied with vibrant acidity and notes of citrus, green apple, and chalky mineral depth.
Features notes of lime, baking spice, stone, and green apple. A medium-bodied white with a steely, mineral core and high acidity.
A step up in richness. A bold, structured white with notes of butter, honey, and stone fruit, balanced by a fine acidic backbone.
A round and inviting Meursault. Medium-to-bold body with notes of toasted almond, butter, and ripe yellow orchard fruit.
Elegant and precise. A medium-bodied white with high acidity and classic notes of white peach, lemon, and a persistent mineral finish.
A powerful and concentrated Premier Cru. Bold body with layers of citrus, stone fruit, and intense chalky minerality.
From higher altitude vines. Features high acidity and a lean, elegant profile with notes of white flowers, lemon, and flint.
A rich and structured white. Medium-to-bold body with notes of honey, toasted nuts, and ripe peach, balanced by fine acidity.
A classic Chassagne with a focus on power. Medium-to-bold body with notes of yellow fruit, white flowers, and a touch of spice.
Elegant and well-balanced. Medium-bodied with notes of citrus, stone fruit, and a refined, mineral-driven finish.
A fresh and approachable Chassagne. Medium-bodied with balanced acidity and flavors of pear, apple, and a touch of hazelnut.
From a specific plot. Features a medium body with notes of citrus, orchard fruit, and a clean, stony mineral finish.
A powerful and structured white. Medium-to-bold body with notes of ripe fruit, honey, and a touch of toasted oak.
Right next to Montrachet. A powerful, concentrated white with layers of fruit and intense mineral depth.
A rounder and more approachable Premier Cru. Medium-bodied with notes of white peach, honey, and balanced acidity.
Known for its elegance and mineral drive. Features high acidity and a complex profile of citrus and flint.
A benchmark Chassagne. Medium-bodied and dry with balanced acidity and elegant notes of orchard fruit and white flowers.
Rich and structured Burgundy white. Medium-to-bold body with notes of butter, lemon, and stone fruit.
Elegant and precise. A medium-bodied white with high acidity and classic notes of white peach, lemon, and a persistent mineral finish.
A powerful and concentrated Premier Cru. Bold body with layers of citrus, stone fruit, and intense chalky minerality.
One of the top sites. Exceptional balance of power and elegance with profound mineral depth and long finish.
High-energy white from a master of Saint-Aubin. Light-to-medium bodied with high acidity and intense notes of citrus and wet stone.
Adjacent to Chevalier-Montrachet. Exceptional tension and minerality with notes of lime, flint, and white flowers.
A more approachable and generous Premier Cru. Medium-bodied with notes of white peach, citrus, and balanced acidity.

wine: Saint-Aubin 1er Cru Clos de la Chatèniere MAG
description: From a monopole. Features intense concentration and power in a magnum format, with layers of citrus and profound mineral depth.
A rare white from Santenay. Medium-bodied with high acidity and a unique profile of orchard fruit and intense stony minerality.
Classic PYCM style. Intense reduction (flint/matchstick), high acidity, and a concentrated palate of citrus and green apple with a long mineral finish.
Fresh and approachable. Light-to-medium bodied with high acidity and refreshing notes of orchard fruit and white flowers.
A refined Premier Cru. Medium-bodied with balanced acidity and flavors of pear, apple, and a touch of stony minerality.
Excellent tension and minerality with notes of lime, flint, and white flowers.
Elegant and precise. A medium-bodied white with high acidity and classic notes of white peach, lemon, and a persistent mineral finish.

wine: Saint Aubin 1er Cru Les Combes Blanc
description: A powerful and concentrated Premier Cru. Bold body with layers of citrus, stone fruit, and intense chalky minerality.

wine: Saint Aubin 1er Cru Les Castets Blanc
description: Known for its elegance and mineral drive. Features high acidity and a complex profile of citrus and flint.
A powerful, full-bodied Grand Cru. Features layers of lemon curd, stone fruits, and profound depth of wet-stone minerality.
A fresh and approachable white from the Côte Chalonnaise. Medium-bodied with balanced acidity and notes of white peach and citrus.
A rich and generous Mâcon white. Medium-to-bold body with notes of ripe yellow fruit, white flowers, and balanced acidity.
Elegant and precise. A medium-bodied white with high acidity and classic notes of white peach, lemon, and a persistent mineral finish.
A more approachable and generous Mâcon white. Medium-bodied with notes of white peach, citrus, and balanced acidity.
High-quality white from a legendary producer. Elegant and fresh with balanced acidity and notes of white peach, citrus, and white flowers.
A rich and structured white. Medium-to-bold body with notes of ripe fruit, honey, and a touch of toasted oak.
A fresh and approachable white. Medium-bodied with balanced acidity and flavors of pear, apple, and a touch of stony minerality.
A unique, fresh white. Light-bodied with high acidity and refreshing notes of orchard fruit and white flowers.
A unique Chardonnay from the Jura. Features high acidity and a characteristic saline, mineral profile with notes of orchard fruit.
A classic L'Étoile white. Elegant and precise with high acidity and intense notes of citrus and wet stone.
High-quality Jura Chardonnay. Features a medium body with balanced acidity and complex notes of orchard fruit and minerals.
Dry with peach, nectarine, and minerals. Features high acidity, a light body, and fruity notes of gooseberry and grapefruit.
Classic Sancerre. High acidity and a light body with intense notes of gooseberry, lemon, and flinty minerality.
A serious, age-worthy Muscadet. High acidity and a light body with intense saline minerality and notes of citrus and green apple.
A concentrated and powerful Pouilly-Fumé. Medium-to-bold body with notes of citrus, flint, and white flowers.
A fresh and approachable Northern Rhône white. Medium-bodied with balanced acidity and flavors of white peach and citrus.
A medium-bodied, aromatic blend rich in Viognier. Offers an oily texture and notes of apricot, white peach, and honeysuckle.
A southern-inflected Chardonnay with Burgundian precision. Features a medium body, crisp acidity, and a profile of lemon curd and pear.
High-quality English Chardonnay. Features a medium body with balanced acidity and complex notes of orchard fruit and minerals.
An elegant Chardonnay from the Trentino region. Medium-bodied with balanced acidity and flavors of orchard fruit and a touch of toasted almond.
Stony and intense with notes of lime, fennel, and lemon juice. Features steely, palate-cleansing acidity and a mineral tang.
A high-quality Galician white. Features a medium body with balanced acidity and notes of white peach, citrus, and a refined mineral finish.
A top-tier Godello. Exceptional balance of power and elegance with profound mineral depth and long finish.
A unique white from Catalonia. Features high acidity and a characteristic saline, mineral profile with notes of orchard fruit.
Classic Mosel Riesling characterized by a very dry (Trocken) profile and a lean body. Dominated by piercing acidity and slate minerality.
A powerful Grand Cru Riesling. Exceptional balance of power and elegance with profound mineral depth and long finish.
Classic Nahe Riesling. High acidity and a light body with intense notes of green apple, lemon, and slate minerality.
More concentrated than the village level. Features ripe citrus and white flowers with a persistent, mineral finish and sharp acidic structure.
A powerful Grand Cru Riesling. Exceptional balance of power and elegance with profound mineral depth and long finish.
One of the top Rieslings. Exceptional balance of power and elegance with profound mineral depth and long finish.
Classic Pfalz Riesling. High acidity and a light body with intense notes of green apple, lemon, and slate minerality.
A powerful Grand Cru Riesling. Exceptional balance of power and elegance with profound mineral depth and long finish.
A high-quality dry Riesling with a few years of age. Features balanced acidity and a complex profile of citrus and petrol notes.
Classic Pfalz Riesling. High acidity and a light body with intense notes of green apple, lemon, and slate minerality.
Fresh with flavors of apple, citrus, and herbs. Features high acidity and a light-to-medium body with a stony, mineral finish.
Elegant and precise. A medium-bodied white with high acidity and classic notes of white peach, lemon, and a persistent mineral finish.
A stylish and precise Chardonnay. Medium-bodied with crisp acidity and notes of white peach, lemon, and a distinctive chalky minerality.
A step up in concentration. Features layers of citrus, orchard fruit, and a refined, elegant structure.
Classic Provence Rosé. Light-bodied and fresh with balanced acidity and notes of strawberry, white peach, and a touch of saline minerality.
A classic Bordeaux red. Medium-to-full-bodied with structured tannins and notes of black fruit, cedar, and a touch of earthiness.
An elegant, aged Bordeaux red. Medium-bodied with soft tannins and notes of blackcurrant, leather, and forest floor.
A structured and powerful Bordeaux red. Bold body with firm tannins and notes of black fruit, cedar, and graphite.
A fresh and approachable red. Medium-bodied with balanced acidity and flavors of red fruit and a touch of earthiness.
Classic cool-climate Pinot Noir with a light body and bright red-fruit focus. Features tart cherry and cranberry notes.
Magnum format. Expect a slower aging profile, preserving the fresh red fruit and bright acidity.
Elegant and well-balanced. Medium-bodied with notes of red fruit, earth, and a refined, mineral-driven finish.
A stylish and precise Pinot Noir. Medium-bodied with fine-grained tannins and notes of cherry and earth.
Produced by a master of Volnay. This red is elegant and understated, with a light body and pure red fruit flavors.
An elegant, well-structured Pinot Noir. Balanced acidity meets a medium body with notes of cherry, raspberry, and earth.

wine: Côteaux de l'Auxois Clos de la Romanéé

An elegant, well-structured Pinot Noir. Balanced acidity meets a medium body with notes of cherry, raspberry, and earth.
Expressive red fruit of cherry and strawberry with medium complexity. A light-to-medium bodied wine with soft tannins and an easy-to-drink profile.
Vinified in stainless steel (Inox) to preserve purity. Offers an extremely clean, light-bodied profile with high acidity and crisp red fruit flavors.
A fresh and approachable Pinot Noir. Medium-bodied with balanced acidity and flavors of cherry and earth.
A fresh and approachable red. Medium-bodied with balanced acidity and flavors of red fruit and a touch of earthiness.
Elegant and well-balanced. Medium-bodied with notes of red fruit, earth, and a refined, mineral-driven finish.
A stylish and precise Pinot Noir. Medium-bodied with fine-grained tannins and notes of cherry and earth.
A fresh and approachable red. Medium-bodied with balanced acidity and flavors of red fruit and a touch of earthiness.
Elegant and well-balanced. Medium-bodied with notes of red fruit, earth, and a refined, mineral-driven finish.
Powerful and structured Grand Cru with over 80 mentions of red fruit notes (strawberry, raspberry, cherry). Full-bodied and complex.
Elegant and precise. A medium-bodied red with high acidity and classic notes of cherry and earth.
A structured and powerful red. Bold body with firm tannins and notes of black fruit, earth, and spice.
A structured and powerful red. Bold body with firm tannins and notes of black fruit, earth, and spice.
Exceptional precision and depth. Medium-bodied with high acidity and a complex profile of red fruit and earthy minerals.
A powerful and concentrated Premier Cru. Bold body with layers of red fruit and intense mineral depth.

Classic Volnay elegance. Light-to-medium bodied with soft tannins and pure red fruit flavors.
A more structured and powerful red with notes of dark fruit, plum, and spice. Bold body with firm tannins and balanced acidity.
Old vine concentration. A medium-bodied red with balanced acidity and a complex profile of cherry and earth.
A structured and powerful red. Bold body with firm tannins and notes of dark fruit, earth, and spice.
Highly coveted red with legendary precision. Medium-bodied and dry with balanced acidity and elegant notes of red fruit and spice.
The 2022 vintage. Expect the same legendary precision with perhaps a slightly more generous fruit profile.
A powerful and concentrated Premier Cru. Bold body with layers of red fruit and intense mineral depth.
Features red fruit notes, specifically cherry. A light-to-medium bodied red with balanced acidity and soft tannins.
A powerful, full-bodied Grand Cru. Features layers of black fruit, spice, and profound earthy minerals.

wine: Clos De La Roche Grand Cru
description: One of the top Grand Crus. Exceptional balance of power and elegance with profound mineral depth.
Elegant and well-balanced. Medium-bodied with notes of red fruit, earth, and a refined finish.
Lovely finessed nose of ripe plum and violet with some meatiness. Medium-bodied with notes of cherry and earthy mushroom.
Classic cool-climate Pinot Noir with a light body and bright red-fruit focus.
More concentrated than the village level. Features ripe red fruit and a persistent finish.
A fresh and approachable red from a white-focused village. Medium-bodied with balanced acidity and flavors of cherry.
Old vine concentration. A medium-bodied red with balanced acidity and a complex profile of red fruit and earth.

Fresh and approachable. Light-to-medium bodied with balanced acidity and refreshing notes of red fruit.

A juicy, fruit-forward red dominated by Grenache. Medium-to-full-bodied with soft tannins.

wine: Selvapiana Vin Santo del Chianti Rufina
description: A traditional sweet white/amber wine. Full-bodied and luscious with notes of dried apricot, nuts, and honey.
A luscious dessert wine with a perfect balance of high sweetness and electric acidity.
A traditional sweet wine from Tokaj. Full-bodied and luscious with notes of honey, apricot, and intense minerality.
